Off Calendar May-23-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appearing via zoom for Laura Brockwehl (Executor).

Mrs. Eisenberg stated that she is waiting for the formal accounting and once received she can finalize and file. Status on close of estate is continued to July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to file papers by July 03, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rachel Brooks, in propria persona, Beneficiary.

The court confirms that Ms. Brooks is not appearing to object to the petition for probate. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-05-2013 is admitted to probate. Laura Brockwehl is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-21-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
